
[source layer]
  (P-series)
    [must-fix] UF-P1 main.tex — \setDedicationFile{'dedication'} but no file found in project root (required: dedication (or dedication.tex) exists in project root)
      fix: Create the named file in the project root (or fix the macro argument).
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-p1--setfile-companions-exist-on-disk

Summary: 1 must-fix, 0 review.
